title: Root Inc (ROOT) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Root Inc achieved a significant profitability milestone in Q3 2024, reporting net income of $23 million, representing a $69 million year-over-year improvement. The company demonstrated substantial operational gains across multiple metrics. The insurance company reported operating income of $34 million and adjusted EBITDA of $42 million, both showing approximately $60+ million improvements year-over-year. Root achieved a gross loss ratio of 57%, described as believed to be industry best, with a gross combined ratio of 89—nearly 30 points better than the prior year. Operating cash flow reached nearly $50 million in the quarter. The company also successfully refinanced its term loan with BlackRock, reducing the facility from $300 million to $200 million while improving the cost of capital by at least 300 basis points. The partnership channel experienced significant expansion, with new writings more than doubling year-over-year. However, Root currently covers only 75% of the U.S. population and continues expanding its geographic footprint to achieve 100% coverage. Retention rates remain impacted by the company's earlier hypergrowth phase, resulting in a younger policyholder base with higher churn. Root continues refining segmentation and telematics models to balance competitive pricing with target returns.
